name: Patty Ann's Lucious Apricot Bars
recipeInstructions:
Recipe by: Patty Ann Spalding Preparation Time: 0:35
Oven at 350°F. Cover apricots with water and bring to a boil for 10 minutes. Drain and cool, then chop. Grease a 7 x 11-inch pan. Mix butter, sugar, and 1 cup sifted flour until crumbly. Pack evenly in the pan. Bake for 25 minutes or until lightly browned. Sift together 1/3 cup sifted flour, baking powder, and salt. Beat eggs and brown sugar until combined. Add flour mixture, vanilla, apricots, and nuts. Spread over baked layer. Bake for an additional 30 minutes or until set. Cool in the pan. Cut into bars. Roll in powdered sugar. Store in the tin box between layers of wax paper.
